Digital Craft Kala Topi About Contact

Get in touch

Let's make something.

Glasgow-based, remote-friendly. Whether you're looking to hire, commission a project, or just want to talk shop — the door's open. I respond within two working days, usually sooner.

Available for work

01 — Employers

Looking to hire?

Open to full-time and contract roles in UI design, product design, and brand. Remote-first, with genuine interest in Glasgow-based or Scottish studios. I work across digital and physical — which is rarer than it sounds.

UI / Product Design Brand Identity Full-Time Contract

02 — Clients

Got a project?

I take on brand, web, and signage work through SCM Design Studio. I'm a one-person operation — you get me, not a junior handed a brief after the pitch. Best suited to small and medium businesses who want work that actually looks considered.

Web Design & Build Brand Identity Signage Shopify

03 — Collectors & Makers

Ceramics enquiries

Ceramics work is handled through SH27 Design. Commissions, studio visits, and collaboration with other makers are all welcome. If you're interested in the multanni mitti practice specifically, even better — I enjoy talking about it.

Commissions Multanni Mitti Exhibitions Collaboration

Send a message

Prefer a form?

Fill this in and it'll come straight to my inbox. The more detail the better — a good brief saves everyone time.

I'll get back to you within two working days. No newsletters, no follow-ups you didn't ask for.

What to expect

01

A response within two working days

Usually faster. I don't disappear after an enquiry — if I can't take the project on I'll say so clearly and quickly.

02

A proper conversation before any proposal

I'd rather understand what you actually need than send a template quote. A short call or a few emails usually gets us there.

03

Honest about what I can and can't do

If a project isn't the right fit I'll tell you. I'd rather point you somewhere useful than take work I won't do well.

04

Glasgow-based, remote-friendly

Most client work is fully remote. Happy to meet in person for Glasgow projects — or travel for the right opportunity.

Sherjeel Hussain — Glasgow
